children.text:
Manage all of your entered items or add new ones. Here you can do the following: 

	• Add new items 
	• Rename or delete entered items 
	• Assign categories to items 
	• Assign a unit to an item 
	• Add multiple items to a shopping list

Add new categories or manage your existing ones. Here you can do the following: 

	• Add new cateogries 
	• Rename or delete existing categories 
	• Change the sort order of your categories for different shops

Add new units or manage your existing ones. Here you can do the following: 

	• Add new units 
	• Rename or delete existing units

Add new shops or manage your existing ones. You can select a shop when creating a shopping list. Through that selection every category will be automatically sorted in the order you defined in the all categories menu. Furthermore all of your items will get the prices of that shop. 
Here you can do the following: 

	• Add new shops 
	• Rename or delete existing shops

Manage all of your products that are associated with one or multiple Barcodes. 
Once a Barcode has been added to an item it will be recognized instantly next time. (No more online lookup) 
Here you can do the following: 

	• Add new barcodes 
	• Rename or delete barcodes

Do you want to be reminded when to go shopping? No problem. Here you can do the following: 

	• Set a reminder for specific list 
	• Manage your existing reminders
